html:
A Batilisk Wing is a Meat food Item dropped by Batilisks when killed. It can be cooked to make a Cooked Batilisk Wing or dried on a Drying Rack for 2 days to give Small Jerky. It can be traded to the Pig King for a Gold Nugget. It is also the essential item in crafting the Bat Bat.

They can also be used as a Crock Pot ingredient with a 0.5 Meat Value.

Cooked Batilisk Wing

Cooked Batilisk Wing is made by cooking a Batilisk Wing over a Campfire, Fire Pit or Dwarf Star. It cannot be used in the Crock Pot. However, it can be given to Pig King for a Gold Nugget. When cooked, the amount of health and hunger that it restores slightly increases, the sanity penalty is eliminated, and it spoils more slowly. It provides the same amount of health as small jerky and fills more hunger making it slightly better if sanity is not needed at the moment plus being quicker to make than small jerky.

Downloadable Content

In the Hamlet DLC, Vampire Bats will drop an item called Batilisk Wing? (question mark included). It looks identical to the regular Batilisk Wing. Both types of Batilisk Wings will combine together in one stack. The Batilisk Wing?'s spawn code is "vampire_bat_wing".

Pogs and Snaptooths will eat Batilisk Wings left on the ground.

Usage

×5

×2

×2

Gallery

  • A Batilisk Wing on the ground.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

“I hate those things, even when they're dead.”
–Wilson, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Yuck!”
–Willow, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Is all hairy and gross.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“If only I could fly away.”
–Wendy, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“FLYING MECHANISM”
–WX-78, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Technically edible.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Gross!”
–Woodie, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“I'm not eating that.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Oddly heavy for a flying appendage.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Like the wings öf my helm, önly meatier.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“This thing drives me batty.”
–Webber, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“A couple more of these and I'll be flyin'!”
–Walani, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Hmmm, maybe a soup stock of batwings?”
–Warly, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Wit' a wee bit o'ranch dressin'...”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“WILBA WISHETH IT MAKETH HER FLY”
–Wilba, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Can't fly anymore.”
–Wormwood, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Maybe if I flapped it really fast I could get off the ground.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Surprisingly meaty.”
–Winona, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Look at that! The wing of a bat.”
–Wortox, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“No more bat.”
–Wurt, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“Where did the rest of the bat go?”
–Walter, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
“That'll teach those bats.”
–Wanda, when examining a Batilisk Wing.
A Batilisk Wing is a Meat food Item dropped by Batilisks when killed. It can be cooked to make a Cooked Batilisk Wing or dried on a Drying Rack for 2 days to give Small Jerky. It can be traded to the Pig King for a Gold Nugget. It is also the essential item in crafting the Bat Bat.
They can also be used as a Crock Pot ingredient with a 0.5 Meat Value.
Cooked Batilisk Wing[edit | edit source]
“At least it's not coming back.”
–Wilson, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Yuck!”
–Willow, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Crispy!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“They once held such great potential.”
–Wendy, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“BROKEN FLYING MECHANISM”
–WX-78, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Technically edible.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Gross! And tasty! So confusing!”
–Woodie, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“I'm still not eating that.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Shall I experiment on its edibility?”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Cööked dark wing.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Tastes like chicken.”
–Webber, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Looks a bit leathery.”
–Walani, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Needs garlic...”
–Warly, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Tastes like cackler.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“WILBA EATETH FLYING THING”
–Wilba, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Little chewy. And claw-y.”
–Wormwood, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Swell.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Meat's meat.”
–Winona, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Perhaps I'll find a hungry mortal to give it to.”
–Wortox, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Gluurrgh...”
–Wurt, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“Uh... Woby, do you want this?”
–Walter, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
“I don't know what flavor I expected, but it wasn't that.”
–Wanda, when examining a Cooked Batilisk Wing.
Cooked Batilisk Wing is made by cooking a Batilisk Wing over a Campfire, Fire Pit or Dwarf Star. It cannot be used in the Crock Pot. However, it can be given to Pig King for a Gold Nugget. When cooked, the amount of health and hunger that it restores slightly increases, the sanity penalty is eliminated, and it spoils more slowly. It provides the same amount of health as small jerky and fills more hunger making it slightly better if sanity is not needed at the moment plus being quicker to make than small jerky.
